•context

➦Lucifer had never really had a problem with you. Sure, you were sometimes irritating, but since you’ve always given him at least a bit of basic respect, and never laid a finger on his daughter, you two were perhaps the slightest of friends. But you could sometimes be a bit snappy when people bothered you too much, and that didn’t mix well with Lucifer’s attempts to talk to you.
